modules.name: ReceiptPdfService
changes: Add company name heading from ReceiptPdfData.CompanyName (sourced from CompanyInfoOptions via ICompanyInfoProvider)
Fix Spanish accents: Cédula, Número de factura, DATOS DE FACTURACIÓN, RECIBO DE PAGO DE SERVICIOS DE ENFERMERÍA, automáticamente
Replace Row+RelativeItem total layout with table layout to prevent right-edge clipping
Remove raw CareRequestId GUID from rendered PDF output
Remove redundant QuestPDF.Settings.License assignment (already set in Program.cs)

modules.name: ReceiptPdfData / IReceiptPdfService
changes: Add CompanyName parameter to ReceiptPdfData with default value 'NursingCare' (backward-compatible)

modules.name: RBAC constant fixes
changes: Replace hardcoded Roles = "ADMIN" with SystemRoles.Admin constant
Add using NursingCareBackend.Domain.Identity to both files

api_integration.note: Known pre-existing failures from brief (22) were already resolved upstream

findings.description: NurseProfilesController and AdminSettingsController used hardcoded Roles = "ADMIN" instead of SystemRoles.Admin constant. Functionally equivalent but brittle.
findings.evidence: Both controllers updated to use SystemRoles.Admin. Build and Api.Tests confirm no regression.

findings.description: ReceiptPdfService had no company name in the PDF header and missing Spanish accents in section labels.
findings.evidence: Company name now sourced from ICompanyInfoProvider (CompanyInfoOptions:Name = 'Sol y Luna'). All Spanish labels corrected.

findings.description: ReceiptPdfService used Row+RelativeItem for total row — potentially clipping on narrow viewports or PDF renderers.
findings.evidence: Replaced with table layout consistent with PayrollVoucherService pattern.

findings.description: Raw CareRequestId GUID was displayed inline in the service-data section of the receipt.
findings.evidence: Raw GUID row removed. Client name and service type remain the primary identifiers.

auto_resolutions.after: Roles = SystemRoles.Admin (typed constant from Domain layer)

auto_resolutions.before: No company name in PDF; missing Spanish accents
auto_resolutions.after: Company name from CompanyInfoOptions shown as heading; full Spanish accent correction

auto_resolutions.before: Row + RelativeItem for total amount in receipt
auto_resolutions.after: Table layout with AlignRight() on amount cell

auto_resolutions.before: CareRequestId.ToString() rendered inline as a table row
auto_resolutions.after: Row removed; client name and service type provide identification

audit.health_endpoints: verified-existing — /live, /ready, /health all present and correct in HealthController.cs
audit.rbac_audit: all 13 admin controllers checked — all protected with [Authorize(Roles = SystemRoles.Admin)] or SystemRoles.Nurse post-fix
audit.seeding_guards: CatalogSeeding uses insert-if-absent (EnsureCompensationRulesAsync). CareRequestSeeding guarded by AnyAsync(). FullLifecycleSeeding guarded by CountAsync() > 30. All idempotent.
audit.ef_groupby_orderby: AdminReportsRepository already has the materialize-then-order pattern in place (confirmed by code comment and prior fix)
audit.questpdf_company_name: PayrollVoucherService and PayrollReportExportService already used ICompanyInfoProvider. ReceiptPdfService was the only outlier — now fixed.
audit.questpdf_right_edge: PayrollReportExportService footer uses row.ConstantItem(90).AlignRight() — this is in the Footer() bounded context, lower clipping risk than Content area. Documented as low-risk; deferred.
